tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I don't need to be anything other[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
Than a prison guard's son[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I don't need to be anything other [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
Than a specialist's son[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]
I don't have to be anyone other[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] 
Than the birth of two souls in one[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Part of where I'm going, is knowing where I'm coming from[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
Anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
All I have to do[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I'm tired of looking 'round rooms[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
Wondering what I've got to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I'm surrounded by liars everywhere I turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
I'm surrounded by imposters everywhere I turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]        
I'm surrounded by identity crisis everywhere I turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
Am I the only one who noticed?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
I can't be the only one who's learned[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want to be [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
All I have to do[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I'm tired of looking 'round rooms[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]              
Wondering what I've got to do [/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
Can I have everyone's attention please?[/tab]
[tab]N.C                                                          ([ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch])
If you're not like this and that, you're gonna have to leave[/tab]
[tab]N.C.                     ([ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch])
I came from the mountain[/tab]
[tab]N.C.                   ([ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch])
The crust of creation[/tab]
[tab]N.C                         [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
My whole situtaion-made from clay to stone[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
And now I'm telling everybody[/tab]

(strum one per chord)


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                                    [ch]E[/ch]
Anything other that what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
All I have to do[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
Is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]

(start strumming again)

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I'm tired of looking 'round rooms[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
Wondering what I've got to do[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want to be[/tab]
